subject: docs(audit): sync documentation with actual code, add decision comments
body:
Comprehensive audit found docs had drifted from the TypeScript/SvelteKit
codebase. CLAUDE.md referenced 15 non-existent .js files from pre-migration
architecture. BUSINESS_GUIDE.md had completely different variant names for
Models 3-6. Code files lacked required decision documentation comments.

- CLAUDE.md: Replace all stale .js paths with actual Svelte/TS components,
  fix model filenames, add 4 missing docs to table, fix Troubleshooting
- BUSINESS_GUIDE.md: Update variant names for Models 3, 4, 5, 6 to match code
- README.md: Fix variant counts (Model 3: 8, Model 4: 8)
- model-use-cases (all 6): Remove dead concept file links, fix variant counts
- model-6-saas.ts: Add decision docs (why simpler than Models 1-2)
- pricing/+page.svelte: Document equilibrium formula and 40% heuristic
- structuring/[model]/+page.svelte: Document progressive disclosure pattern
- Create /docs/working/ directory (referenced in CLAUDE.md but missing)

Tags: docs, audit, comments, models, ui
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: documentation-audit
Semver: patch

title: sync documentation with actual code, add decision comments
